firstNightReminder: Show the character token of a character in play. Point to two players, one of which is that character.
name: Hermes
ability: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular character.
flavor: The fastest messenger in all the lands. If only he took the time to remember the address.

firstNightReminder: Wake up a good player. Show them the Aphrodite token and point to the Aphrodite player. Wake up an evil player. Show them the Aphrodite token and point to the Aphrodite player.
name: Aphrodite
ability: A good player and an evil player start knowing you are Aphrodite.
flavor: Why don't we make up and go back to my place?

firstNightReminder: Show the finger signal (0, 1, 2, ...) for the length of the longest instance of neighbouring Townsfolk.
name: Zeus
ability: You start knowing the length of the longest chain of Townsfolk [+1 Outsider]
flavor: I'm not evil! May Zeus himself strike me down if I'm ly-

firstNightReminder: Point to a player who isn't the Demon.
otherNightReminder: If the known player has died, point to another player who isn't the Demon.
name: Apollo
ability: You start knowing a player who isn’t the Demon. If the player you know dies, learn another tonight.
flavor: The darkness has not yet touched your heart, for my light shines brightly through you, mister 'Psychopath'.

otherNightReminder: If today was Poseidon's first day: Show the finger signal (0, 1, 2, …) for the amount of evil players among the player marked 'Trident' and their neighbours. Remove the reminder token.
name: Poseidon
ability: On your first day, publicly choose a player. Tonight, learn how many evil players are among them and their neighbours.
flavor: To publicly throw a trident at another player... It's plain ruthlessness.

otherNightReminder: If a player was executed today: Show a player of the same alignment as the executed player.
name: Hera
ability: Each night* you learn a player that is of the same alignment as the player that died by execution today.
flavor: The silent sobs of a grieving widow can be heard a thousand rooms away, by those listening for it.

firstNightReminder: Dionysos points to a living player. Point to a player of opposing alignment. The good one is drunk.
otherNightReminder: Dionysos points to a living player. Point to a player of opposing alignment. The good one is drunk.
name: Dionysus
ability: Each night, choose an alive player (not yourself), learn a player of opposing alignment. The good one is drunk until dusk.
flavor: Listen babe, you're bringing the vibe down! Have some Ambrosia, on the house.

firstNightReminder: Demeter either shows a 'no' head signal or the 'yes' head signal. If they show the 'yes' head signal, show them an in-play character token
otherNightReminder: If Demeter has not yet used their ability, Demeter either shows a 'no' head signal or the 'yes' head signal. If they show the 'yes' head signal, show them an in-play character token, plus an additional one for each night they have chosen not to use their ability.
name: Demeter
ability: Once per game, at night, choose to learn an in-play character. For each night you’ve chosen not to, learn an additional.
flavor: Winter is coming.

otherNightReminder: Athena points to a player. If that player would die, they don't: wake Athena and show the character token of the player they selected. Athena dies.
name: Athena
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they cannot die tonight. If your ability saved them, you learn their character and die.
flavor: Someone said Athena's companion sounds like an owl.

name: Artemis
ability: When you learn that you’ve died and 5 or more players are alive, you may publicly choose a player: if they are the Demon, they die.
flavor: I've got the beast in my sights.

name: Sisyphus
ability: When you die at night, the next time the Demon would wake, they don't.
flavor: One must imagine Sisyphus happy.

firstNightReminder: Wake the townsfolk who is evil and show them the 'You are' card and the thumbs down evil sign.
otherNightReminder: If Odysseus has died, wake the townsfolk who is evil. Show them the 'This is the Demon' card and point to the Demon.
name: Odysseus
ability: When you die, the evil Townsfolk learns the Demon. You cannot be drunk or poisoned. [-1 Minion, +1 Evil Townsfolk]
flavor: I see portrayals of betrayal, Poseidon.

name: Heracles
ability: While 5 or more players are alive, you are safe from the Demon. If only 2 players are alive, your team wins.
flavor: Slayer of lions, boars and three headed dogs, oh my!

otherNightReminder: When Icarus dies, place the reminder token. After the next execution, remove the reminder token.
name: Icarus
ability: When you die, if the next execution causes an alive good player to die, your team loses.
flavor: If Icarus flies too high, his wax wings melt in the sunlight. If Icarus flies too low, he isn't having as much fun as he could be: an impossible dilemma.

name: Medusa
ability: Once per game, you might register as evil, even while dead. When you die by execution, the nominating player gains that ability.
flavor: She's also a sculptor for hire.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Demon. Show them the 'Narcissus' character token and point to Narcissus.
otherNightReminder: If 4 or fewer players are alive, at any point in the night, show the 'You are' card. Then show the Narcissus character token.
name: Narcissus
ability: While 5 or more players are alive, you think you are a Townsfolk, but you are not. The Demon knows you are Narcissus.
flavor: You're beautiful, Narcissus. Thank you, Narcissus. You're welcome, Narcissus.

otherNightReminder: If Achilles' heel is dead at any point in the night, Achilles dies.
name: Achilles
ability: A good player is your Achilles’ heel. If they are dead, you die at night.
flavor: Achilles' real weakness is not his heel. It's Patroclus.

firstNightReminder: Pandora either shows the 'no head signal' or points to a player: they are poisoned.
otherNightReminder: If Pandora has not yet used their ability: Pandora either shows the 'no head signal' or points to 1 player for each POISON reminder token they are marked with: these players are poisoned.
name: Pandora
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: they are poisoned. For each night you've chosen not to, choose another player.
flavor: What is up, Pan-fans, welcome to another unboxing video.

otherNightReminder: If Charon's offer has not yet been accepted: Charon either shows a 'no' head signal or points at a dead player. Wake the selected player and show the 'This character selected you' card and the Charon token. They show the head signal (nod yes, shake no). If they nod yes, wake Charon and the selected player together.
name: Charon
ability: Each night*,  you may choose a dead player to offer an opportunity to turn evil. If they accept, learn each other and lose this ability.
flavor: Abandon your sinking ship, sailor. The ferryman offers safe passage to the Underworld.

otherNightReminder: If Thanatos has not yet used their ability: Thanatos either shows the 'no' head signal or points to a character on their sheet. If they pointed to an in-play character, that character dies
name: Thanatos
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a character: they die, even if for some reason they could not.
flavor: One cannot truly live without Death. It is to die for.

otherNightReminder: If an outsider died today, Circe points to a minion character on their sheet. If they point to an in-play minion, give the 'no' head signal and allow them to pick again. If they've picked a not-in-play minion, show the 'You are' card and the corresponding minion token.
name: Circe
ability: At night, if an outsider died today, choose a not-in-play Minion character to be. [+1 Outsider]
flavor: She's got the incantation for any situation.

otherNightReminder: Hades points to a player: they die. If they point to a dead player, their left (clockwise) neighbour dies and then their right (anti-clockwise) neighbour dies. Hades cannot die from attacking a dead neighbour.
name: Hades
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you choose a dead player, their left and right neighbour (not you) die instead.
flavor: Stupid boy. Do you believe this realm is yours to leave? Your place is here. Blasted mortals aren't as foolish as you.

firstNightReminder: Polyphemus points to a player. Show that players' character token.
otherNightReminder: Polyphemus points to a player. Show that players' character token. Polyphemus points to a player. That player dies.
name: Polyphemus
ability: Each night, choose a player: learn their character. Each night* choose a player, they die.
flavor: Nobody can defeat him.

otherNightReminder: Chronos either shows the 'no' head signal, or points to a player. That player dies. For each night in a row they have given the 'no signal', they may point to an extra player.
name: Chronos
ability: Each night*, you may choose a player: they die. For each consecutive time you’ve chosen no-one, choose another.
flavor: Time is ticking, Melinoë. You don't want to keep Time waiting.

otherNightReminder: If no Fates died today, the Fates collectively point to a player. That player dies.
name: The Fates
ability: Each night*, if no Fates died today, collectively choose a player: they die. You register as a minion too. [Minions are Fates]
flavor: While the Fates may weave our destiny, nothing is set in stone. For the Fates are always weaving.
